videos.title: The Semantic Model Became the Product — Here’s Why Power BI Is Changing
videos.description:
What if the most important thing in Power BI… isn’t the report anymore?

In this video, Patrick walks through a modern Microsoft Fabric and Power BI solution to show why semantic models are becoming the real analytical product.

Using a hospitality analytics scenario built in Microsoft Fabric, we explore how:

 - Semantic models centralize business meaning
 - Field parameters create dynamic report experiences
 - Reusable measures and metadata power modern analytics
 - Copilot and AI depend on se

videos.title: Power BI Desktop Just Got Version History 🤯
videos.description:
Power BI Desktop now includes built-in Version History support — and it’s a feature many of us have been waiting for 👀

In this video, Marthe walk through:
- How Version History works inside Power BI Desktop
- Restoring older versions of your PBIX files
- Why this is useful for report development
- The important difference between version history and version control

No more:

SalesReport_FINAL_v2.pbix
SalesReport_FINAL_v2_REAL.pbix

This feature makes managing Power BI rep

Full conversation on the channel.

#AI #AgentCon #TechEvents

videos.title: AI's Role in Software Engineering
videos.description:
What does it mean to be a software engineer in the age of AI?

As AI takes over coding tasks, the role of a software engineer is evolving. It's not about losing your job; it's about embracing what makes you uniquely human. How can you stay relevant in this AI-driven world? Focus on your unique skills and adaptability. The future is uncertain, but your human touch will always be needed.

#SoftwareEngineering
#AI
#CareerGrowth
